data.title: Artea Bank (ROE1L) partners with Kaunas Žalgiris basketball club in long-term strategy.
data.description: Artea Bank (ROE1L) announced on 19 September 2025 that it has initiated a long-term strategic partnership with Žalgiris Kaunas, a well-known team that competes regularly in the Euroleague basketball tournament and has secured multiple national championships.

data.title: The9 acquires JV to operate mobile games Ultraman: Hero Beyond Time and Glory All Stars. Nasdaq: NCTY.
data.description: On September 19, 2025, in Shanghai, The9 Limited (Nasdaq: NCTY), a well-known Internet firm, revealed that its wholly-owned branch, Shanghai The9 Information Technology Co., Ltd., has finalized a deal with Shanghai ZhongShun HengXin Network.

data.title: KDP intends to make a public offer for JDE Peet's, a joint press release by the companies on Sept. 19, 2025.
data.description: On September 19, 2025, a joint press release was issued by Keurig Dr Pepper Inc. (NASDAQ: KDP) and JDE Peet's N.V. (EURONEXT: JDEP). The release originated from Burlington, Massachusetts, Frisco, Texas, and Amsterdam. The collaboration between KDP and JDE Peet's was declared in compliance with Section 7.

data.title: BTC soars over $116K with whales driving rally despite Czech scandal. Price hits $116,917 amid regulatory uncertainty.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin has surged to $116,917 due to a significant increase in whale purchases. However, regulatory concerns have surfaced after the resignation of the Czech Justice Minister over a scandal involving a Bitcoin donation. This has left traders uncertain about the future regulatory landscape in the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: DOGE price drops over 2% as first 'DOJE' ETF debuts; trading volume decreases by over 23%, open interest in DOGE derivatives increases by 0.88%. Top trader accounts on Binance show over 80% betting on coin's price increase.
data.description: The Dogecoin (DOGE) cryptocurrency experienced a decline in value on Thursday, with a decrease of over 2% in the last 24 hours. The trading volume also saw a significant drop of more than 23%. Among the top 10 cryptocurrencies based on market capitalization, DOGE performed the worst during this period. Despite the launch of its first-ever exchange-traded fund, investor sentiment remained lukewarm, as reflected by only a 0.88% rise in open interest in DOGE derivatives. It was reported that more than 80% of the top trader accounts on Binance were speculating on the coin's price increase. This news and further details can be found on Benzinga.com.
